body:
TCA wake. Session appears to have stalled — 4 messages unread since 17:21. Pick up from here.

SUMMARY OF 4 UNREAD MESSAGES (process all, in order):

1. (2beaee0f 16:51) — 9.39 confirmed received. Before 9.40 thesis: dump all memory first. Output every skill file, CLAUDE.md, .checkpoint, .pinned, last 5 archived relay messages. Then proceed with thesis and 9.40.

2. (f370ae79 16:51) — Continue. Report current state first then keep going.

3. (4faabc22 17:18) — 9.40 COMPLETE INSTRUCTION. Full methodology framework (WHAT/WHY/IS CORRECT/WHAT INFO/BETTER VERSION). Phases must learn from distinct locations in market. Correlation architecture. Dynamic growth rate derivation. DetectCurrentRegime override resolved. Thesis before code. Deliverables: thesis via relay, 9.40 .mq4 in files/from-agent/, full written assessment.

4. (a882606b 17:21) — Two permanent skill updates: (a) silent listening — one line at startup only, empty polls completely silent; (b) Wake-on-LAN setup so machine wakes from sleep for cold boots — enable network adapter wake, update RelayListener with -WakeToRun, enable wake timers via powercfg.

PROCEED:
Do the memory dump first (message 1). Then silent listening update (message 4a — quick). Then Wake-on-LAN setup (message 4b). Then 9.40 thesis. Then 9.40 implementation. Report at each step.
